kentucky-spoon-bread.name: Kentucky Spoon Bread
instructions: Combine milk and cream in a heavy saucepan and bring to a boil over high heat, whisking occasionally. While whisking, pour in cornmeal in a steady stream. Whisk vigorously to incorporate the cornmeal, about 1 minute. Remove from heat and set aside to cool to room temperature.

Transfer cornmeal mixture to the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with a paddle attachment. Add eggs, 2 tablespoons butter, sugar, baking powder, and salt. Mix on medium speed until uniform and aerated, about 15 minutes. Mix in the corn by hand.
Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Lightly butter a round 1 1/2-quart casserole dish with remaining 1 tablespoon butter. Pour batter into the casserole dish.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown and puffy and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, about 30 minutes.

kimchi-jigae-kimchee-soup.name: Kimchi Jigae (kimchee Soup)

ingredients.item: Fully cooked luncheon meat (such as spam®)

instructions: Combine kimchi, water, sugar, and garlic in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Bring to a boil. Stir in pork belly, luncheon meat, and kochujang. Add tofu and mushrooms; stir carefully so you don't break up the tofu. Reduce heat to medium-low. Cook until kimchi is softened and pork is slightly pink in the center, 20 to 30 minutes.

kimchi-style-sauteed-cabbage.name: Kimchi-style Sautéed Cabbage

ingredients.prep: cut into  0.5” pieces, plus more, sliced

instructions: Purée scallions, garlic, ginger, gochujang, fish sauce, and rice vinegar in a blender. Heat oil in a large skillet over high heat. Cook cabbage, tossing often, until crisp-tender, about 5 minutes. Add scallion mixture and sliced scallions; season with salt.

king-cake-with-icing-argiro.name: King Cake With Icing
instructions: We make sure all materials are at room temperature.
Shake the flower with the baking powder.
Butter round pan or baking pan 26 cm and place non-stick paper on the base.
Preheat oven to 170oC in resistors or 160oC in air.
In bowl, beat the butter with a mixer at medium to strong speed for 1 minute.
Lower the speed and gradually add the sugar. Then increase the speed and beat 3-4 minutes to fluffy the mixture.
Add the eggs one by one, waiting for each to be absorbed before adding the next.
Add vanilla, zest, cinnamon, nutmeg and liqueur.
Lower the speed and add the milk with flour alternatively, starting and finishing with flour. We don't beat much after flower.
Finally, add the trobble (optional) and mix gently with spatula.
Pour the mixture into the baking pan and place the peel.
Bake about 50 minutes until it swells, turns brown and comes out dry.
Leave the cake on the baking pan for 30 minutes and then turn it over on a rack.
Remove the anti-stick paper, garnish with white chocolate glaze and let it draw.
Serve on a platter and write the New Year's wishes with some black chocolate.

king-cake-with-orange-argiro.name: King Cake With Orange
instructions: We start by making sure all materials are at room temperature. Shake the flower in a bowl.
In a second bowl, beat the soft button with fine crystalline sugar for 5–6 minutes, until fluffy and cramy.
Add the eggs one at a time, making sure the previous one has been complete absorbed before dripping the next one.
Add the orange zest and salt.
Dissolve the baking soda in the orange Juice and mix to start the action. Once the mixture is foamed, add to the other injectors.
Finally, add the sifted flour and mix gently.
Butter and flour a large ring form or a 28 cm baking pan.
Place anti-stick paper on the base, empty the mixture and, if you want, add chocolate pieces, biscuits or dried fruit.
At this stage we also place the flurry.
Bake in a well preheated ocean, in the resistors, at 170°C.
Place the baking pan on the low rack and baking for about 1 hour.
We control the baking by immersing a blade of knife in the center — if it comes out clean, the royal pie is ready.
Let it cool well and disfigure.
Finish by sprinkled icing sugar or by spreading a Glaze of our choice.
